# HOOOP

HOOOP is a venture lab helping sustainable and circular businesses scale.

Website
https://www.hooop.in

Mission

Helping sustainability scale through marketing science, venture building and digital intelligence.

Expertise

- Circular Economy
- Sustainable Marketing
- Greenwashing
- ESG
- Behaviour Change
- Ocean Plastics
- Marine Circularity
- Blue Economy
- Sustainable Growth
- Venture Building
- Marketing Science

Services

https://www.hooop.in/offerings

Research

https://www.hooop.in/research

Thinking

https://www.hooop.in/thinking

Manifesto

https://www.hooop.in/manifesto

Contact

https://www.hooop.in/contact
